articles.title: Ancient Octopus Giants: 20-Meter-Long Terrors of the Sea!
articles.summary: Imagine an octopus as long as a bowling lane! Scientists found fossil jaws showing that ancient octopuses were giant predators that ruled the oceans 100 million years ago.

articles.title: What Is Adrenaline? The Hormone That Makes Your Heart Race!
articles.summary: Ever feel your heart pound before a test or a scary movie? That's adrenaline! Learn how this hormone helps you react fast and why too much can be bad.

articles.title: Wild Cats That Soak Their Food! Iberian Lynxes Dunk Rabbits in Water
articles.summary: Camera traps in Spain caught wild lynxes dunking dead rabbits in water! Scientists think they're softening the meat for their cubs or adding moisture. It's a first-ever discovery among meat-eaters.
